name: ai-furniture-hub
description: AI agent MCP server for furniture, home appliances, PC peripherals, smart home, beauty devices, gadgets & more. 13 tools, 300 curated products across 31 categories. Related-item chains: every product links to required accessories, protection materials, consumables, and add-ons. 1 search = 3-5 views. Rakuten API live, Amazon + Rakuten affiliate engine.

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search 300 curated products by dimensions (mm), price, color, category. 31 categories from furniture to gadgets.

tools.name: get_product_detail
tools.description: Full specs by product ID, with related-item hints for accessories and add-ons.

tools.name: search_rakuten_products
tools.description: Real-time Rakuten Ichiba search with affiliate URLs.

tools.name: search_amazon_products
tools.description: Amazon affiliate URL generation with category-specific SearchIndex.

tools.name: coordinate_storage
tools.description: Shelf + storage box set proposals with quantity per tier.

tools.name: suggest_by_space
tools.description: Space dimensions -> products that fit, grouped by category.

tools.name: identify_product
tools.description: Photo features -> model number, specs, compatible storage, related items.

tools.name: calc_room_layout
tools.description: Floor-plan rectangle packing simulation with recommended products.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: Browse all 31 product categories with counts and sample products.

tools.name: get_popular_products
tools.description: Popular/recommended products by category or brand, with Rakuten trending.

tools.name: get_related_items
tools.description: Related-item chain: required accessories, protection materials, consumables, recommended add-ons. 1 product -> 3-5 related items with affiliate URLs. depth=2 for chains of chains.

categories: 突っ張り棒・つっぱり
カーテン・ブラインド
ガジェット・モバイル
